new_value:
{"description":"Known bug: beads#2096 / #2023. On v0.56.1, `bd init --from-jsonl` reports "Imported N issues" but the Dolt database has 0 rows.

Root cause: init.go:53-55 reads the --from-jsonl flag and discards it. The Dolt bootstrap that was supposed to handle it was removed in v0.56.1.

Fix commit fd21fa46 is on main but didn't resolve it for us even after rebuilding to v0.57.0. Trillium fixed it manually (method unknown — ask next session).

Migration steps that worked for this repo:
1. gt init (in parent dir) — creates Gas Town rig directories
2. bd init --from-jsonl --force (in git repo) — creates Dolt schema
3. Manual fix by Trillium to actually persist the 37 issues
4. bd dolt stop --force && bd dolt start — restart server between attempts
5. Added .dolt-data/, .events.jsonl, .events.jsonl.lock, daemon/, deacon/ to .git/info/exclude (gt init missed these)

Key gotcha: Dolt database name must match issue prefix ("massage"). Migration created it as "beads" — had to rename .beads/dolt/beads -> .beads/dolt/massage and restart server.

Community workarounds if hit again: Python script inserting via bd sql (handles NOT NULL columns: design, acceptance_criteria, notes). See beads#2096 comments."}
old_value: {"id":"massage-nql","title":"bd init --from-jsonl doesn't persist issues to Dolt on v0.56.1","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"trillium@trilliumsmith.com","created_at":"2026-03-01T18:36:00Z","created_by":"Trillium Smith","updated_at":"2026-03-01T18:36:00Z"}

new_value: Resolved — 37 issues imported. Root cause was stale binary + Dolt db name mismatch. See description for future reference.

{"description":"Goal: Initialize massage repo as a Gas Town rig and migrate existing 37 beads from SQLite to Dolt backend.

Status: Migration complete. 37 issues loaded in Dolt.

What was done:
1. gt init in parent dir — created Gas Town rig structure
2. Added .dolt-data/, .events.jsonl, .events.jsonl.lock, daemon/, deacon/ to .git/info/exclude (gt init missed these)
3. bd init --from-jsonl --force — migrated 37 issues into Dolt
4. Key fix: Dolt database name must match issue prefix ("massage"). Migration created it as "beads" — renamed .beads/dolt/beads -> .beads/dolt/massage and restarted server.

Next: Choose work from the 37 beads (bd ready).","title":"Set up Gas Town rig + migrate beads to Dolt"}
